'''鈭歞-y-m-th''' ('''kadaymethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wainscoat|wainscoat]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-y-m-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wainscoat|wainscoat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-y-m-th
|-
! Lemma
| kadaymethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidaymethoko|thidaymethoko]] || [[word:jidaymethoko|jidaymethoko]] || [[word:shidaymethoko|shidaymethoko]] || [[word:kidaymethoko|kidaymethoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
